caption: A man is seated in a room filled with framed pictures and clothing racks, speaking into a professional microphone. He wears a camouflage baseball cap, large over-ear headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" printed in white. In the background, a white mannequin torso and various garments on hangers are visible. Two logos appear on screen: one on the left side featuring a red circle and the word "TIME" and another on the right with red text. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and slightly shifting his head and facial expression while leaning forward with his arms resting on the surface in front of him. The lighting and background remain constant as he continues to talk into the microphone.
